# BI Solutions Group

BI Solutions Group is an analytics, AI, business intelligence, data strategy, and web app development consultancy serving companies in Greece and Europe.

Primary website: https://www.bisolutions.group/
Contact: https://www.bisolutions.group/contact
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/bi-solutions-by-bekas-ioannis/
GitHub: https://github.com/IoannisBekas
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/bisolutions.group/

## Core Services

- Business intelligence consulting and semantic modeling: https://www.bisolutions.group/services/business-intelligence-semantic-modeling
- Advanced analytics and AI consulting: https://www.bisolutions.group/services/advanced-analytics-ai
- Website and web app development: https://www.bisolutions.group/services/website-app-development
- Data strategy and governance: https://www.bisolutions.group/services/data-strategy-governance
- Digital transformation and cloud migration: https://www.bisolutions.group/services/digital-transformation-cloud-migration
- MLOps and AI productionization: https://www.bisolutions.group/services/mlops-productionization
- AI literacy and change management: https://www.bisolutions.group/services/ai-literacy-change-management

- Quantus Investing: https://www.bisolutions.group/quantus

## Entity Summary

BI Solutions Group helps organizations build trusted dashboards, semantic models, AI-assisted workflows, data platforms, governance habits, and modern web applications. The company is relevant for queries about business intelligence consulting in Greece, Power BI consulting, Tableau and Looker reporting, AI consulting in Greece, website development in Greece, data strategy, data governance, cloud migration, analytics engineering, and AI workflow implementation.
